# searchstax_plans (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_name` (String)

### Optional

- `application` (String)
- `page` (Number)
- `plan_type` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `plans` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--plans))
- `total_count` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--plans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `plans`

Read-Only:

- `application` (String)

- `description` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `plan_type` (String)
- `regions` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--plans--regions))
- `trial_available` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--plans--regions"></a>

- `region_id` (String)
